feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Normal is Far, but Weird is Within Reach
entry.summary:
Author: Chiyo_Fujimori

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,401Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: "Clark brought up unpredictable conversation matters. And it was an early evening, the sun just beneath the horizon and a soft umbre over the silhouette of buildings, when Clark asked a strange question during their watchtower shift. 'Do you ever wonder what it would be like to be normal?'" ----- A moment in which Clark chooses to be vulnerable with Bruce during a quiet watchtower shift. What else can Bruce do but hold Clark so he knows that Bruce will always catch him?

entry.title: A Courtship In Five Stages
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,121Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 5

Summary: Six years in the same house. Never once the word for it. When Clark begins a courtship rite his dead world left him only fragments of, Bruce does what Bruce does: he reads ahead. The vessels are ash. The grammar is incomplete. They have a kitchen, a wood, and four pillows to make it out of. A wedding in five stages, improvised from whatever's on the shelf.

entry.title: After the Last Heartbeat
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,291Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Alfred Pennyworth woke up dead at 11:34 AM on a Tuesday in October and by midnight had reorganized the suppression rotation, argued protocols with Jason Todd, held Thomas Wayne for the first time in forty years, and filed a math anomaly in the Naldoreth accounting under investigation required. After the Last Heartbeat is the fourth part of The House We Never Leave. It is the one where the dead side gets its full complement, where Alfred and Jason discover what Naldoreth actually is and what fixing it will require, where Bruce and Clark search the archives and all the lights go out and the crowd comes to the windows singing in Yoruba and Bantu and Swahili and Xhosa and doesn't leave at dawn, where Clark makes his decision about his door, and where Alfred learns fourteen names with hundreds still to go. The accounting has begun. It will take years. They are doing it anyway.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Don't Look Back
entry.summary:
Author: lovelytime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,500Chapters: 8/20Kudos: 69

Summary: Clark had died, and the world kept spinning. He wasn't quite sure where he fit now that he was back, but he knew better than to look back. Unfortunately, old habits die hard.

entry.title: A Touch of Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Fyoex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,305Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 56

Summary: To prepare for a scenario where Superboy loses his powers mid-battle, Nightwing volunteers to help train them using Blue Kryptonite. But concern mounts when Jon has an abnormally strong reaction to it. And when he’s later kept in the dark about the young Kent’s condition, Dick Grayson finds himself becoming a tad unhinged. – Even before his Kryptonian heritage officially set in, Jonathan Kent had never once gotten sick, not even with the common cold. So he didn’t quite understand the implications behind a simple bruise. It’s alright, though. This was a part of being human.

entry.title: It’s brutal out here!
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,870Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 371

Summary: When Bruce’s silence gestured for him to go on, Clark chuckled slightly, fiddling with the sleeve of his shirt. “You know what I mean. Everyone had a grungy era of their childhood. Mine was just a little more . . . intense than others. I was more rebellious than troublesome, honestly.” Or Clark gets de-aged to seventeen a.k.a when he had his punk rock phase, and everyone is forced to bare witness

entry.summary:
Author: tummyclub

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,469Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: "Superman Porn (NOT FAKE!!!) Highest bidder (advertisement)Description: digital product, uncensored, duration: 1 hour, weird alien shit, the more you pay the more you see, full footage release and ownership to highest bidder, LUTHORCORP SOURCED. Then, there was the grainy screenshot attached to it: Superman cuffed and collared to a tilted medical table in obvious distress and drenched with sweat, the barest hints of what could be alien genitalia flush and on full display." -- (aka Superman's nudes leak and chaos ensues- will Bruce and Clark be able to find love, despite what happened with Lex in the past?)

entry.title: red, white & boy scout blue
entry.summary:
Author: mitsukiris

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,417Chapters: 10/13Kudos: 202

Summary: 'Bruce chuckles, no ounce of amusement in it, “I believe perhaps you should consider switching to water, Kent.” “Should I?” Clark asks, batting his eyelashes at Bruce. “Why? Am I offending you? Sorry I’m not obsessed with you like everyone else. I know that must be confusing for you.” “You know what?” Bruce eyes him up and down. “I think you are.” Clark is frozen. He can’t move. He blinks a few times, slowly trying to digest the words. He can’t. And Bruce? Well, Bruce’s polite smile turns smug and almost a little mean.' or: Pulitzer winning journalist Clark Kent and playboy Bruce Wayne have to pretend to be friends after one sweet incident. What will happen when this fake friendship turns into a real one? What will happen when it turns into something more?

entry.title: nothing's gonna change (nothing stays the same)
entry.summary:
Author: a_horse_with_tuberculosis

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,532Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 12

Summary: "B," Clark said, breathing a sigh of relief. Bruce didn't look nearly as happy."You shouldn't have jumped in front of me," he said, voice lacking all the warmth Clark had gotten used to in his hallucination. Right."I should go," Clark said, breaking their usual back-and-forth rhythm. "I, uh, have an article due.""Superman, wait—" Bruce started, but Clark was already out of the Watchtower. He couldn't go hang out with Bruce like nothing happened until he got the hallucination out of his head. And whatever he did, he absolutely could not let Bruce know about what he saw.ORClark encounters the Black Mercy and sees a life with Bruce.

entry.title: breathe in twos and fours
entry.summary:
Author: dragmewithyoutonirvana

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,684Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: "It'll only be two weeks. I love you." Of course, Clark knew he loved him. He didn't need to hear the words. But it was for Bruce, not him. "I love you, too." When Clark returned, he said those words dozens of times, but in the middle of the night, Bruce would wonder: was that the last time he had talked to Clark?or: after an off-world mission, Clark starts acting a little weird. Bruce notices.

entry.title: The Physics of Familiarity
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,020Chapters: 11/11Kudos: 24

Summary: Lois Lane knows Clark Kent the way you know a city you've lived in for twelve years—by which streets flood in heavy rain, which shortcuts only work on Tuesdays, which silences mean danger and which mean he's just watching a bird. Alfred Pennyworth has been recording Bruce Wayne's vital signs, dietary intake, psychological indicators, and patrol efficiency for thirty years. He has documentation. He has baselines. He has thirty years of knowing exactly what this man looks like. Neither of them recognizes what's sitting across from them at breakfast. At Tuesday lunch. In the study at 6 AM in Thomas Wayne's Edinburgh sweater, holding coffee with both hands, watching the garden like it's somewhere he's allowed to be. They came to the same conclusion by different routes: something is wrong. They're beginning to suspect they might be wrong about that.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Proof of Detection
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 71,135Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 90

Summary: The worst has already happened - Recognition, Rejection, devastation. Now Bruce and Clark are forced to work together to solve a mystery that could alter the course of the world, while helping to build the Justice League. Can Bruce live with what he's done? Can Clark forgive the ultimate betrayal? Will the League survive the fallout if they can't?
